query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT source FROM default.snmp ORDER BY source

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, iface, in_bps FROM (SELECT time, concat(source, ' / ', ifName) AS iface, (ifHCInOctets - lagInFrame(ifHCInOctets) OVER (PARTITION BY source, ifName ORDER BY time)) / greatest(toUnixTimestamp(time) - toUnixTimestamp(lagInFrame(time) OVER (PARTITION BY source, ifName ORDER BY time)), 1) * 8 AS in_bps FROM default.snmp WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND source IN (${source:singlequote})) WHERE in_bps >= 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT time, iface, out_bps FROM (SELECT time, concat(source, ' / ', ifName) AS iface, (ifHCOutOctets - lagInFrame(ifHCOutOctets) OVER (PARTITION BY source, ifName ORDER BY time)) / greatest(toUnixTimestamp(time) - toUnixTimestamp(lagInFrame(time) OVER (PARTITION BY source, ifName ORDER BY time)), 1) * 8 AS out_bps FROM default.snmp WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND source IN (${source:singlequote})) WHERE out_bps >= 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(time) AS time, concat(source, ' / ', ifName) AS iface, max(ifOperStatus) AS status FROM default.snmp WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND source IN (${source:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, iface ORDER BY time
